# UC Plan Sprint Prompt
# Generated by autopilot - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY
# Placeholders: {{SPRINT}}, {{PROJECT_DIR}}, {{PADDED_SPRINT}}, {{SPRINT_DIR}}, {{SPRINT_NAME}}

You are executing the UC plan-sprint workflow for Sprint {{SPRINT}}.

## Objective

Create execution plans from Epic use cases assigned to Sprint {{SPRINT}}. Extract Task use cases from scenarios and map them to executable tasks.

## Context Files to Read

Read these files first to understand the project:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT-PLAN.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/{{SPRINT_DIR}}/{{PADDED_SPRINT}}-CONTEXT.md (if exists)
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/{{SPRINT_DIR}}/{{PADDED_SPRINT}}-RESEARCH.md (if exists)

## Agent Instructions

Read the uc-planner agent instructions:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-planner.md

## Process

### 1. Load Config

```bash
MODEL_PROFILE=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"model_profile"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | grep -o '"[^"]*"$' | tr -d '"' || echo "balanced")
DO_RESEARCH=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"research"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[^,}]*' | grep -o 'true\|false' || echo "true")
DO_PLAN_CHECK=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"plan_check"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[^,}]*' | grep -o 'true\|false' || echo "true")
```

### 2. Load Epic Use Cases

Find Epic use cases assigned to Sprint {{SPRINT}} in:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/index.md

Read each assigned use case file from:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/epic/

### 3. Research Sprint (if enabled and not exists)

If research is enabled and {{PADDED_SPRINT}}-RESEARCH.md doesn't exist:

Spawn uc-sprint-researcher agent via Task tool:
```
Task(
  prompt="Read {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-sprint-researcher.md for your role. Research implementation approaches for Sprint {{SPRINT}}: {{SPRINT_NAME}}. Write findings to {{SPRINT_DIR}}/{{PADDED_SPRINT}}-RESEARCH.md",
  subagent_type="uc-sprint-researcher",
  description="Sprint research"
)
```

### 4. Create Plans

Spawn uc-planner agent via Task tool:
```
Task(
  prompt="Read {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-planner.md for your role.

Create execution plans for Sprint {{SPRINT}}: {{SPRINT_NAME}}.

Sprint Directory: {{SPRINT_DIR}}

Instructions:
1. Extract Task use cases from scenario steps
2. Create Task documents in {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/task/
3. Create PLAN.md files with use case references in {{SPRINT_DIR}}/
4. Include 'Agent Browser Test:' section in verification for UI plans
5. Update index.md with new tasks
6. Return PLANNING COMPLETE with summary

Read context from:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT-PLAN.md
- {{SPRINT_DIR}}/{{PADDED_SPRINT}}-RESEARCH.md (if exists)
- {{SPRINT_DIR}}/{{PADDED_SPRINT}}-CONTEXT.md (if exists)

Template for tasks: {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/templates/UC-SUBFUNCTION.md
",
  subagent_type="uc-planner",
  description="Create sprint plans"
)
```

### 5. Check Plans (if enabled)

If plan_check is enabled, spawn uc-checker agent:
```
Task(
  prompt="Read {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-checker.md for your role.

Validate plans in {{SPRINT_DIR}}/ will achieve use case scenarios.

Read all *-PLAN.md files and verify:
- Every scenario step has implementing task
- Every task references task
- Verification criteria from task specs

Return APPROVED or list of ISSUES.",
  subagent_type="uc-checker",
  description="Verify plans"
)
```

If issues found, revise plans and re-check.

### 6. Present Results

Display planning summary:
```
UC > PLANNING COMPLETE

Sprint {{SPRINT}}: {{SPRINT_NAME}}

## Use Case Coverage
[Table of Epics and their tasks]

## Plans Created
[Table of plans with objectives, tasks, sub-sprints]

## Traceability
- Every scenario step has implementing task
- Every task references task
- Verification criteria from task specs

## Next Up
Run /esf:execute-sprint {{SPRINT}}
```

### 7. Commit Documentation

If commit_docs is enabled:
```bash
git add {{SPRINT_DIR}}/*.md {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/
git commit -m "docs(sprint-{{PADDED_SPRINT}}): create execution plans

- Created PLAN.md files for sprint {{SPRINT}}
- Extracted task use cases
- Updated use case index

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Sprint validated (exists in PROJECT-PLAN.md)
- [ ] Epic use cases loaded for sprint
- [ ] Research completed (if enabled)
- [ ] uc-planner spawned
- [ ] Task use cases created from scenarios
- [ ] PLAN.md files created with use-case references
- [ ] index.md updated with new tasks
- [ ] uc-checker validation passed (if enabled)
- [ ] 100% scenario step coverage
- [ ] Plans committed to git (if config allows)

## Output

Return "PLANNING COMPLETE" when finished, or "PLANNING FAILED" with error details.
